# Yair Mau — Personal webpage

> Markdown versions of my published papers, made available for LLM consumption.

## Papers

- [
Tree Growth, Contraction and Recovery: Disentangling Soil and Atmospheric Drought Effects](https://yairmau.com/archive/papers-md/feuer2025tree): Disentangles soil vs. atmospheric drought effects on Aleppo pine growth using dendrometer data and an irrigation experiment. Yatir forest, Israel. Published PCE 2025.
